steps: Grow cells in a 6-well plate until a 90-100% confluency in RPMI 1640 complemented with 10% FBS heat inactivated (Complete Media, CM). They should be preferable 48 h old. The day before synchronize cells overnight in G 0 arrest by incubating cells in RPMI 1640 media without FBS. RPMI 1640 medium Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #21875109 Fetal Bovine Serum Gibco - Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #10270106
30 min before infection, remove media without FCS and add 1 ml per well of new Complete Media (CM). If you need to add inhibitors, this is the time point to do it.

Resuspend the pre-infecting bacteria (Bacteria A) for T 0 in PBS, NOT IN BROTH, and measure the OD 550 . Try to resuspend bacteria shortly before infection, do not keep them in PBS too long. Calculate the amount necessary for the desired MOI. The standard MOI is 60 (OD 550 0,2/well). To calculate consider that an OD 550 of 0,1/ml is equivalent to approx. 3x10 7 cfu/ml. Try to resuspend bacteria right before infection, do not keep them in PBS too long
Add bacteria A to the cells and incubate at 37°C, 5% CO 2 for 1 hour.

Prepare the suspension of the translocating bacteria (Bacteria B) around 15 min before the 60 min of the pre-infection is due. After 60 min, add Bacteria B at an MOI of 60. Infect for 2 to 3 additional hours at 37°C, 5% CO 2 .
Stop the infection by placing the plate on ice. For the rest of the procedure, maintain the samples cold to minimize protease activity.

Collect the media for cytokine measurements or remove the media with help of a vacuum pump. Add 1 ml PBS* (PBS (Ca-, Mg-) with 1 mM Sodium orthovanadate, 1mM PMSF, 1 µM Leupeptin, 1µM Pepstatin). Prevent the well’s surface from drying out (crystal formation damages the cells). concentrations!!! PBS, 1mM PMSF, 1µM Leupeptin, 1µl Pepstatin, 1mM Ortho-Vanadat Sodium Orthovanadate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S6508-10G PMSF Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P7626 Leupeptin Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Pepstatin A Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #P5318

With a cell scrapper detach the cells from the bottom of the plate. Prevent too much scrapping since this will damage the cells more than desired. Collect the cell suspension in a 1,5 ml tubes. Centrifuge the cells 500 g for 10 minutes at 4°C in a swing rotor. ... damage the cells more than desired

Discard ALL the supernatant. Resuspend the pellet in 20 µl of your favorite Lysis buffer containing protease inhibitors. Add immediately 25µl of 2X SDS loading buffer and boil the probes at 95°C for 10 min. To avoid condensation and stickiness of DNA, place the tubes immediately in ice . Do not centrifuge!. Store at -20°C until samples can be analyzed with western blot
creator: Luisa F Jimenez-Soto
